title: Code specification
description: CSS token mapping with syntax highlighting showing all design token bindings

sections.tokens: Flat array of type+text pairs for syntax-highlighted code. Show the component's primary CSS selector with all token bindings: height, padding, colors (background, border, text), typography (font-family, font-size, line-height, letter-spacing), border-radius, transitions. Use var(--zen-*) for token values with resolved pixel/color values in comments.

qualityRules: Code must use the component's actual CSS selector (e.g., .zen-text-input), not a generic name
Every token binding must use var(--zen-*) syntax, never hardcoded values
Include a comment with the resolved value after each token binding (e.g., /* 48px */)
Cover ALL visual properties: height, padding, colors, typography, border-radius, transitions
Use proper CSS syntax — each property on its own line, semicolons, proper indentation
Token types must match the syntax token color map: selector, property, value, comment, punctuation, newline
Include newline tokens between lines — renderers depend on these for line breaks
